info.title: Lombiq Hosting - Media Theme Deployer for Orchard Core
info.description: Lombiq Hosting - Media Theme Deployer for Orchard Core: A tool to easily export Media Themes. See the project website for detailed documentation.

options.name: --path
options.description:
Required. Path of your theme
project.

options.name: --base-id
options.description:
ID of the base theme, if any. If
left empty, will attempt to get the
value from the theme's Manifest.

options.name: --clear
options.description:
Whether or not to clear the Media
Theme media folder of all files
before deployment.

options.name: --deployment-path
options.description:
The path where you want the
deployment package to be written to.

options.name: --deployment-file-name
options.description:
The file name of the deployment
package zip and the value for the
recipe name property.

options.name: --remote-deployment-url
options.description:
The URL to use for Remote
Deployment, as indicated on the
Orchard Core admin.

options.name: --remote-deployment-client-name
options.description:
The "Client Name" part of the Remote
Deployment client's credentials.

options.name: --remote-deployment-client-api-key
options.description:
The "Client API Key" part of the
Remote Deployment client's
credentials.
